revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-205

A system of visual or audible devices to indicate that a fault has occurred on a machine or apparatus and that action must be taken to investigate and correct the fault.

{{IALAFooter}}
